title: OJK Has No Plan Yet to Lift Fintech P2P Lending Moratorium in 2026
title_zh: 【监管】OJK 称尚无计划在2026年取消 P2P 新增登记冻结
summary: OJK signals continued moratorium on new P2P registrations while focusing on prudence, anti-fraud, and consumer protection.
summary_zh: OJK 表示新增 P2P 登记冻结(moratorium) 尚无在年内全面解除的计划，更强调行业基础、反欺诈与消费者保护，以可持续方式推进 fintech 借贷。

title: Indonesia Fintech Lending Outstanding Financing Surpasses Rp 100T in Feb 2026
title_zh: 【P2P】印尼 fintech 借贷在贷 2026年2 月超 Rp 100 万亿、同比+25.75%
summary: Official sector statistics show fintech P2P outstanding financing at Rp 100.69 trillion, up 25.75% YoY, with TWP90 in monitored range.
summary_zh: 行业通报显示 fintech 借贷在贷约 Rp 100.69 万亿、同比 +25.75%，TKB90(逾期质量) 等指标在监管可接受区间内波动，持续受 OJK 与媒体关注。

title: OJK Projects Positive Fintech Lending Growth in 2026 on Digitalization
title_zh: 【监管/数据】OJK 预计 2026 年 fintech 借贷继续正增长
summary: OJK points to product innovation, alternative data, and digital channels as growth drivers for P2P in 2026 under oversight.
summary_zh: OJK 指出在合规前提下，产品创新与替代数据将支撑 2026 年 fintech 借贷保持正增长，与 BI 推进数字化支付形成协同。

title: Ten P2P Fintechs Yet to Meet Rp 12.5B Equity Rule: OJK
title_zh: 【P2P】10 家 P2P 未达 Rp 125 亿实缴资本要求，OJK 要求整改
summary: OJK reports 10 of 95 registered P2P platforms below minimum equity, with remediation plans or capital action due.
summary_zh: OJK 披露在登记平台中，有10 家尚未完全满足 Rp 125 亿 最低股权要求，需通过增资、引入战投或合并等方式达标。

title: Bank Jago Net Profit Surges 115% to Rp 276B in 2025
title_zh: 【数字银行】Bank Jago 2025 年净利大增 115% 至 2760 亿盾
summary: ARTO’s Bank Jago reports strong FY2025 earnings and balance-sheet growth, underscoring digital bank competition in Indonesia.
summary_zh: CNBC 引用财报：Bank Jago (ARTO) 2025 年净利润约 Rp 2760 亿、同比高增，反映数字银行在存贷与科技协同上的扩张。

title: Kredivo Group Digital Bank (BBSI) Books Profit in Q1 2025
title_zh: 【数字银行】Kredivo 系数字行 BBSI 2025 年一季度实现盈利
summary: Bisnis reports Kredivo-linked digital bank posting quarterly profit, part of vertical integration with BNPL and lending.
summary_zh: Bisnis 报道 Bank Seabank Indonesia (BBSI) 等与 Kredivo 集团协同的数字行在一季度实现盈利，体现 BNPL 与银行牌照联动。

title: Kredivo Welcomes Special BNPL Rules, Eyes Broader Innovation
title_zh: 【BNPL】Kredivo 欢迎 OJK 专门 PayLater/BNPL 规制、冀扩大创新协作
summary: Kredivo responds to OJK’s plan for dedicated paylater rules, supporting clearer supervision and more collaboration with banks and merchants.
summary_zh: 针对 OJK 将出台的BNPL/PayLater 专章，Kredivo 表态支持更清晰的监管边界，以扩大与银行、场景方的产品与合作。

title: Kredivo’s PayLater Unit Acquires Salary-Advance Fintech EMS
title_zh: 【BNPL】Kredivo 旗下 PayLater 收购工资预支 fintech EMS
summary: Bisnis covers Kredivo paylater’s acquisition of Easy Management Systems to expand earned-wage and workplace-linked credit.
summary_zh: 报道指 PayLater (Kredivo 体系) 收购 EMS 以切入工资预支/人力场景，延伸 BNPL 与短期信贷。

title: Report: Akulaku Secures Large Debt Facility from HSBC for Indonesia Ops
title_zh: 【Akulaku】传 Akulaku 自汇丰获得大额债务授信支持印尼业务
summary: DailySocial reports on Akulaku’s major bank line to refinance and scale multi-finance and BNPL activities in Indonesia.
summary_zh: 媒体披露 Akulaku 与国际大行的授信合作，用於债务置换与业务扩张，凸显多金+BNPL 的资金密集特征。

title: Two Years of QRIS: Digital Finance Acceleration in Indonesia
title_zh: 【电子钱包/支付】两年 QRIS：印尼数字金融加速与商户渗透
summary: DailySocial recaps QRIS adoption by merchants and users as BI-backed national QR standard unifies mobile payments.
summary_zh: 文章回顾 QRIS 作为 BI 推动的国标准二维码，如何提升商户与钱包互通、扩大线下交易数字化。

title: OJK Tackles Thousands of Illegal Online Lenders, Updates Legal List
title_zh: 【现金贷/监管】OJK 持续清剿非法 pinjol，并更新合法名单
summary: Kontan reports mass blocking of illegal lending apps and urges borrowers to use OJK-registered fintech only.
summary_zh: OJK 与特别工作组继续封禁非法平台、公布合法 fintech 名单，提醒借款人只使用登记主体并警惕暴力催收。

title: Thousands of Illegal Lenders Blocked: Check OJK’s Official Fintech List
title_zh: 【现金贷】年内数千非法放贷被拦，OJK 提示核验官方名单
summary: Kontan tallies OJK’s enforcement against illegal online lenders and the importance of the official registry for consumers.
summary_zh: 报道汇总 OJK 在域名/App 阻断、执法通报方面的工作，并链接官方合法名单查询方式。

title: Stay Away from Illegal Lenders: Outstanding Online Loans Hit Rp 92T+
title_zh: 【数字信贷】远离非法平台：在贷与线上 fintech 规模续创新高区间
summary: Kontan combines consumer warnings with OJK data on large outstanding online lending and stable aggregate risk metrics at the time of reporting.
summary_zh: 文章将在贷数据与非法贷风险教育结合，说明合规 fintech 规模扩张与反欺诈/反暴力催收并重的监管环境。

title: GoJek’s PayLater Expands to Tokopedia E-Commerce Checkout
title_zh: 【BNPL/电子钱包】Gojek PayLater 与 Tokopedia 支付场景进一步整合
summary: Tech in Asia Indonesia covers deeper integration of GoPay’s paylater product in Tokopedia, reflecting GoTo’s unified fintech and commerce stack.
summary_zh: 区域科技媒体报道 GoTo 将 PayLater 嵌入 Tokopedia 结账，与 GoPay 生态和电商 GMV 协同。

title: Latest Digital Bank Deposit Rates: Jago, Allo, and Peers in Focus
title_zh: 【数字银行】数字银行存款利率速览：Jago、Allo 等对比
summary: CNBC Indonesia’s rate table shows competitive deposit pricing among licensed digital banks as they chase funding.
summary_zh: CNBC 的定存利率列表反映数字行拉储竞争，Bank Jago、Allo 等通过利率与活动争夺零售存款。

title: OJK: Special PayLater Regulation Coming — Industry Comment Roundup
title_zh: 【监管/BNPL】OJK 将推 PayLater 专门规则(回顾性报道链)
summary: Bisnis reports OJK’s roadmap for paylater-specific rules and Kredivo’s public response, framing BNPL as a key supervised product class.
summary_zh: Bisnis 曾报道 OJK 将出台PayLater 专门监管方向，Kredivo 等玩家表态欢迎规则明朗化以便合规定价与合作。

title: Indonesia e-Wallet & QRIS: Merchant Fees and Ecosystem Maturity
title_zh: 【电子钱包】QRIS 费用与 2600 万+ 商户：生态成熟度讨论
summary: DailySocial analysis discusses QRIS MDR, merchant count milestones, and how fee structures shape adoption beyond big cities.
summary_zh: 文章分析 QRIS MDR 与商户成本，对小微商贩渗透、钱包 GMV 与利润空间的含义。

title: Kredivo Appoints New Board Commissioner Amid Global Expansion
title_zh: 【BNPL】Kredivo 任命新董事强化治理与增长
summary: Bisnis covers Kredivo’s board changes as BNPL and digital credit scale in Indonesia and regionally.
summary_zh: 公司治理与委员会构成随业务规模扩大而调整，体现 OJK 对内控与披露的持续关注。

title: Credit Card Use in Indonesia: Still Room to Grow Amid Digital Alternatives
title_zh: 【信用卡】信用卡渗透率仍低，与 BNPL/钱包并存扩张
summary: Katadata Databoks charts show Indonesia’s credit-card penetration is among the lowest in ASEAN, with BNPL and wallets as parallel rails for consumer credit.
summary_zh: Katadata 数据与图表显示印尼信用卡渗透率在东盟偏低；BNPL、分期、电子钱包 与数字行并行推动消费信贷可得性。

title: Fintech P2P Bright Prospects: OJK Highlights 2026 Growth Momentum
title_zh: 【P2P】Fintech 借贷前景与 OJK 对 2026 动能的公开表态
summary: Kontan summarizes OJK’s view on sustainable growth and risk metrics in P2P for the year ahead.
summary_zh: Kontan 将 OJK 对在贷、盈利与 TKB 的解读与 2026 年增长动能 一并呈现。

title: P2P Lending Growth in Indonesia Amid Rising Regulatory Scrutiny
title_zh: 【P2P】印尼 P2P 增长与风险并存，监管持续收紧
summary: Fintech News Indonesia surveys P2P scale, foreign funding, and OJK enforcement against illegal platforms and high-cost practices.
summary_zh: 英文行业媒体综述 P2P 规模、境外资金占比、非法平台清剿 与高息/催收 等风险，可与 AFPI、OJK 数据 交叉验证。

title: Latest Legal vs Illegal Lender List from OJK: Consumer Alert Story
title_zh: 【现金贷/监管】OJK 发布更新合法/非法贷名单(消费者教育)
summary: Kontan guides readers to OJK’s official lists to avoid scams and illegal high-cost lending apps.
summary_zh: 提醒只使用 OJK 登记 fintech、警惕前期费用与隐私滥用，并引用执法数据。

title: Major Digital Lenders: AdaKami and Kredit Pintar in the OJK-Regulated Field
title_zh: 【现金贷】头部合规线上贷：AdaKami、Kredit Pintar 等(持续跟踪)
summary: CekAja and similar comparators list OJK-legal online lenders and help borrowers verify credentials before applying.
summary_zh: 通过比较与科普站 交叉核对 OJK 名单、利率区间与总成本，降低误借非法平台风险。

title: Asetku: OJK-Registered P2P Under Pintar Inovasi Digital (Akulaku Ecosystem)
title_zh: 【P2P/Akulaku】Asetku 与集团生态：P2P 与多金/ BNPL 分业
summary: Asetku markets productive loans and investment products as an OJK-supervised P2P platform, distinct from Akulaku multifinance/BNPL.
summary_zh: PT Pintar Inovasi Digital 的 Asetku 为 OJK 监督 P2P 平台(注册号以 OJK 公示为准)，与 Akulaku 多金/BNPL 法律主体与产品相区分。
